reason: SAD.md is a thorough, well-structured architecture document covering all 5 FRs and 10 NFRs. Directory layout (4 sub-packages, 9 files) satisfies CRG Principles 1-6 with explicit hub modules, edge-budget analysis, and cohesion strategy. Dependency graph is a proven DAG (16 unidirectional edges, no cycles). SAB block is present with correct phase:2 (int), all 10 NFR types map to legal enum values (performance/security/maintainability/reliability/deployability/scalability), and all 5 FRs are traced to modules. Data-flow diagrams (§3.2-3.5) are internally consistent with module responsibilities. SPEC v4.1.0 changelog line 14 (removal of §6) is verified via fresh Read of SPEC.md. Three low-severity gaps found: (1) edge count text says 15 but 16 edges are listed; (2) NFR-07 owner modules in §2.5
